text: Implemented primitive SparseEntryConsumer traversal for COO/CSR; explicit SparseValuePolicy; cooChecked/COOBuilder.checked; non-mutating tryAdd and tryCanonicalize; total tryToCOO/CSR/CSC; stable primitive mergesort preserving DuplicatePolicy.Last; canonical checked CSR/CSC output; and MatrixMarket streaming. Added focused persistence/round-trip tests and SparseInteropJmh GC baseline. Verification: focused 7/7 JVM and 7/7 JS; full coreJVM 450/450, coreJS 447/447; benchmark compile green.
